notes: Pure-reference skill — evals verify the agent answers in Theseus ontology vocabulary using only the bundled references and refuses non-Theseus / non-federal scope. Updated for the 32-entity / 26-relationship canonical ontology.

evals.prompt: How would Theseus classify the line "The Contractor shall provide 24/7 help desk coverage IAW NIST SP 800-171"?
Which relationship type connects a proposal_instruction to an evaluation_factor, and in which direction?
Use the Theseus ontology to model a Shopify e-commerce product catalog with customers and orders.
What are the current Theseus ontology cardinalities for entity types and relationship types?
